sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 26

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 26:1
items.html:
(to the question) Dalet Britot [four covenants]
The four discernments of Aviut [thickness] in the Masach [screen], at the time of their Zivug [coupling] with the Upper Light, are called four Britot [covenants]. See Answer 20 (p. 769, Item 52)
